global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear focus on a discount offer for a product.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with significant discounts and free shipping.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the ad elements.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The text 'VantaStyle' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Two stylized product images are shown in the center, represented as simple outlines of rectangular shapes.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is placed in the center, adding a decorative touch to the product display.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is displayed in a small badge format, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Discount offer
elements.description: The text 'Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25' is prominently featured in the center, conveying the main offer.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Get offer' is located at the bottom, designed to attract clicks with a bright color.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a clear, bold font at the bottom, indicating the cost of the product.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is shown in a small badge format at the top right, emphasizing a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The brand name is at the top, followed by the product display in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
